No. While an extreme anchor is often a good way to bend their reality, with something as emotional as a home, which is a very personal asset, more care with extreme anchors should be taken. Extreme anchors often cause deals to go away that should otherwise have been made. They would likely reject your offer outright. Also, you're just the name on a contract and they have no idea who you are, which makes you easy to reject as well. Too impersonal. Try again.
